## Summary

What does this PR do? Keep it to 1–3 sentences focused on the *why*.

## Scope

- [ ] Coach app (`app/`, `src/`)
- [ ] Cloud Functions (`functions/`)
- [ ] Parent portal (`parent-portal/`)
- [ ] Firestore rules / indexes
- [ ] Tests / fixtures only
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] CI / build / tooling

## Privacy And Safety Check

- [ ] No real swimmer, family, coach, invite, notification, audio, or video data is included in this PR.
- [ ] No tokens, credentials, `.env` values, service accounts, or roster spreadsheets are included.
- [ ] Auth, role checks, invite redemption, and media-consent gates are unchanged or strengthened.
- [ ] If this touches minors' data flow, the change is reviewed against COPPA / SafeSport handling.
